# Segmentation spike fixtures — provenance

**Slice:** 18 — Unrelated-content segmentation spike  
**Labeler:** QA agent (hand-labeled from scripted transcript; **not** generated by any segmenter)  
**Date:** 2026-07-10

## Script outline

Synthetic podcast episode *Urban Roots* (~79 s ASR span) with clearly separable passages:

| Time (approx.) | Passage | Classification |
|----------------|---------|----------------|
| 0:00–0:14 | Intro — balcony composting topic setup | **On-topic** |
| 0:14–0:28 | Sponsor read — GreenGrow promo, discount code, link in description | **Positive (superfluous/ad-like)** |
| 0:28–0:56 | Composting how-to (worm bins, odor control, winter tips) | **On-topic** |
| 0:56–1:06 | Coffee-shop digression — explicit “side note / unrelated / tangent” | **Positive (tangential)** |
| 1:06–1:19 | Outro — composting checklist + next-episode tease | **On-topic** |

## Golden labels (`golden_segments.json`)

Positive-class ranges only (`[{ "start", "end" }]`). Bounds snap to the first/last `TimedWord` of each labeled passage in `spike_transcript.json`.

| # | Start (s) | End (s) | Duration (s) | Rationale |
|---|-----------|---------|--------------|-----------|
| 1 | 14.130 | 27.510 | 13.4 | Sponsored segment: `sponsored`, `our friends at`, `use code`, `discount`, `link in the description`, `promo` |
| 2 | 56.160 | 65.600 | 9.4 | Tangential digression: `side note`, `unrelated`, `real quick tangent`, `before we continue` |

**Total positive duration:** 22.8 s (≥ 15 s required).

## Independence guarantee

- Labels were assigned from the **scripted dialogue** before any `HeuristicContentSegmenter` (or other candidate) existed.
- Golden ranges were **not** tuned to segmenter output.
- `benchmark-results.json` is **execution evidence** produced later by `PodWashSlowTests/SegmentationBenchmarkTests` running production `HeuristicContentSegmenter` on `spike_transcript.json`; fast tests recompute IoU precision/recall from that artifact vs this golden file.

## Regenerating `benchmark-results.json`

```bash
PODWASH_SCHEME=PodWashSlowTests VERIFY_ALLOW_SKIPS=1 scripts/verify.sh \
  -only-testing:PodWashSlowTests/SegmentationBenchmarkTests
```

Commit the updated `benchmark-results.json` after a green regeneration run.
